### nbdev_prepare

>  nbdev_prepare (project:Optional[str]=None,
>                     extra_args:Optional[List[str]]=None, use_env:bool=True)

*Run nbdev_prepare (export, test, clean notebooks) for the project.*

<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />

<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias. Uses current project if not specified.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>extra_args</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Additional arguments to pass to nbdev_prepare.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>use_env</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>If True, run in project’s conda/mamba environment.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
